critic_notes: All 4 questions are factually correct with verbatim quotes. Topic is methodik throughout; modellierung would also be defensible since the content directly addresses modeling the Informationsverbund with Bausteine. However, methodik is not wrong as the chapter describes process methodology. Flagging for human review of topic choice.

issues.detail: Topic is methodik but chapter content is about modeling the Informationsverbund with Bausteine. modellierung would be equally or more appropriate. Borderline.
Topic is methodik but the question asks about the IT-Grundschutz-Modell result of Baustein selection, which is core modellierung content. Borderline.
Topic is methodik but the question is about Baustein reuse in modeling. modellierung may be more appropriate. Borderline.
Topic is methodik but the question lists elements used in modeling/Ersterfassung. modellierung may be more appropriate. Borderline.
